content: Next.js auth-gated standalone page pattern: Server Component reads session via auth.api.getSession({ headers: await headers() }), calls redirect('/sign-in?callbackUrl=/approve-device') if no session. Page can be in (auth) layout group or a new standalone route group. The /approve-device page is similar to /verify-2fa - standalone auth page outside dashboard but requiring session. Place in app/(auth)/ or a new app/(standalone)/ group with its own layout that has the logo/centered design but checks session. Pattern matches existing DashboardLayout pattern.
